data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Spotify minimizes decision-making time by keeping choices simple.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design of the app ensures easily clickable targets for touch and clicks.

data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Interface elements provide consistent experiences across platforms.
data.technical_spec: Platform-native design elements, homogenous interaction patterns.

data.title: The Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design enhances perceived ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Modern design, smooth animations, intuitive color schemes.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users experience seamless navigation with recognizable design patterns from other apps.
